ast.name: log
ast.source: [Debug] Debug logging is disabled. Enable it in settings to see more debug information.
ast.target: [Debug] 调试日志已禁用。请在设置中启用以查看更多调试信息。

ast.name: log
ast.source: [Debug] === Note Navigator Debug Information ===
ast.target: [Debug] === 笔记导航器调试信息 ===

ast.target: [Debug] 当前文件夹中的排序文件：

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Configure hotkeys
ast.target: 配置快捷键

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Navigate through files in the entire vault or just within the active folder.
ast.target: 在整个库中或仅在当前文件夹内浏览文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically delete unreferenced attachments when their associated note is deleted.
ast.target: 当关联笔记被删除时，自动删除未引用的附件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically navigate to the next file in sort order of the file-explorer after deletion. Disable to use Obsidian's default behavior.
ast.target: 删除后按文件资源管理器的排序顺序自动导航到下一个文件。禁用以使用 Obsidian 的默认行为。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a confirmation dialog before deleting files or folders.
ast.target: 在删除文件或文件夹之前显示确认对话框。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display a notification for each deleted file or folder.
ast.target: 为每个已删除的文件或文件夹显示通知。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable verbose console logging for debugging purposes.
ast.target: 启用详细控制台日志以便调试。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reset all counters for deleted files, folders, and navigations.
ast.target: 重置已删除文件、文件夹和导航的所有计数器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Assign hotkeys to the plugin commands for easier use.
ast.target: 为插件命令分配快捷键以便更易使用。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Auto-navigate after deletion
ast.target: 删除后自动导航

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Parent directory traversal depth
ast.target: 父目录遍历深度

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show confirmation
ast.target: 显示确认

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show notice
ast.target: 显示通知

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Enable debug logging
ast.target: 启用调试日志

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Reset statistics
ast.target: 重置统计信息

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Invalid sort order found. Using default alphabetical sort.
ast.target: 发现无效的排序顺序。使用默认的字母顺序排序。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: No parent folder found for the current file.
ast.target: 未找到当前文件的父文件夹。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: A file must be active to navigate.
ast.target: 必须有活动文件才能导航。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No active editor to scroll.
ast.target: 没有可滚动的活动编辑器。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error loading Note Navigator settings. Using defaults.
ast.target: 加载 Note Navigator 设置出错。使用默认设置。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error saving Note Navigator settings.
ast.target: 保存 Note Navigator 设置出错。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: A file must be open in the active editor.
ast.target: 活动编辑器中必须打开一个文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: An error occurred while navigating or deleting the file.
ast.target: 在导航或删除文件时发生错误。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No active file or folder to debug sorting.
ast.target: 没有可用于调试排序的活动文件或文件夹。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Debug logging is disabled. Enable it in settings to see more debug information.
ast.target: 调试日志已禁用。请在设置中启用以查看更多调试信息。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Debug information logged to console. Check the developer console for details.
ast.target: 调试信息已记录到控制台。请查看开发者控制台了解详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No active file or parent folder found.
ast.target: 未找到活动文件或父文件夹。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: promptForFileRename is not available in this version of Obsidian.
ast.target: 此版本的 Obsidian 不支持 promptForFileRename。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Delete current file and navigate to next note
ast.target: 删除当前文件并跳转到下一条笔记

ast.name: name
ast.source: Navigate to next file
ast.target: 转到下一个文件

ast.name: name
ast.source: Navigate to previous file
ast.target: 转到上一个文件

ast.name: name
ast.source: Log debugging messages to console
ast.target: 将调试消息记录到控制台

ast.name: name
ast.source: Scroll past end of note
ast.target: 允许滚动至笔记末尾之后

ast.name: name
ast.source: Move current file and navigate to next note
ast.target: 移动当前文件并转到下一条笔记

ast.name: name
ast.source: Rename parent folder of current note
ast.target: 重命名当前笔记的父文件夹

ast.name: name
ast.source: Move parent folder and navigate to next note
ast.target: 移动父文件夹并转到下一条笔记

ast.name: text
ast.source: support the developer
ast.target: 支持开发者
